meaning: lit. true religion; orthodox religion; orthodox Christianity; Islam (i
sentence: 东正教在俄罗斯有很大影响力。
pinyin: Dōngzhèngjiào zài Éluósī yǒu hěn dà yǐngxiǎnglì.
english: Orthodox Christianity has great influence in Russia.

sentence: 他名头很大，但实力一般。
pinyin: Tā míng tóu hěn dà, dàn shílì yībān.
english: He has a big reputation, but his actual ability is just average.

sentence: 祠堂里供着祖先的神位。
pinyin: Cítáng lǐ gòng zhe zǔxiān de shénwèi.
english: The ancestral tablets are enshrined in the family hall.

sentence: 这家餐厅是私营企业，经营得很好。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng shì sīyíng qǐyè, jīngyíng de hěn hǎo.
english: This restaurant is a privately-owned business and is doing very well.

sentence: 两国签署了双边贸易协议。
pinyin: Liǎng guó qiānshǔ le shuāngbiān màoyì xiéyì.
english: The two countries signed a bilateral trade agreement.

sentence: 他辞掉工作，打算自己做生意。
pinyin: Tā cí diào gōngzuò, dǎsuàn zìjǐ zuò shēng yì.
english: He quit his job and plans to go into business for himself.

sentence: 师傅用机器把钢板切割成小块。
pinyin: Shīfu yòng jīqì bǎ gāngbǎn qiēgē chéng xiǎo kuài.
english: The worker used a machine to cut the steel plate into small pieces.

meaning: 1. the opposite sex; 2. of the opposite sex; 3. heterosexual; 4. diffe
sentence: 他在新班级里认识了几个异性朋友。
pinyin: Tā zài xīn bānjí lǐ rènshile jǐ gè yìxìng péngyou.
english: He made a few friends of the opposite sex in his new class.

sentence: 他从小就加入了当地的儿童剧团。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù jiārù le dāngdì de értóng jùtuán.
english: He joined the local children's theater troupe when he was young.

sentence: 他为人正直，从不说谎。
pinyin: Tā wéi rén zhèng zhí, cóng bù shuō huǎng.
english: He is an upright person and never lies.

sentence: 市场上劳动力过剩，找工作越来越难。
pinyin: Shì chǎng shàng láo dòng lì guò shèng, zhǎo gōng zuò yuè lái yuè nán.
english: There's a labor surplus in the market, making it harder and harder to find a job.

sentence: 她在时装店买了一件新外套。
pinyin: Tā zài shízhuāng diàn mǎi le yī jiàn xīn wàitào.
english: She bought a new coat at a fashion boutique.

sentence: 这本书的插图很精美。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū de chātú hěn jīngměi.
english: The illustrations in this book are very beautiful.

meaning: 1. to tussle; 2. to contend; 3. to contest
sentence: 十支球队将角逐这次冠军。
pinyin: Shí zhī qiúduì jiāng juézhú zhè cì guànjūn.
english: Ten teams will contend for the championship this time.

meaning: 1. (increasing) day by day; 2. (more critical) with every passing day;
sentence: 这座城市的交通日趋拥堵。
pinyin: Zhè zuò chéngshì de jiāotōng rìqū yōngdǔ.
english: Traffic in this city is getting more congested with each passing day.

sentence: 爷爷每天收听广播节目。
pinyin: Yéye měitiān shōutīng guǎngbō jiémù.
english: Grandpa listens to radio programs every day.

sentence: 她说话带着南方口音。
pinyin: Tā shuōhuà dài zhe nánfāng kǒuyīn.
english: She speaks with a southern accent.

sentence: 吸毒对身体危害极大。
pinyin: Xīdú duì shēntǐ wēihài jí dà.
english: Drug use is extremely harmful to the body.

sentence: 这个小玩意儿挺有意思的。
pinyin: Zhège xiǎo wányìr tǐng yǒu yìsi de.
english: This little gadget is quite interesting.

sentence: 长城以北的地区冬天很冷。
pinyin: Chángchéng yǐ běi de dìqū dōngtiān hěn lěng.
english: The area to the north of the Great Wall is very cold in winter.

sentence: 这棵树移植后顺利成活了。
pinyin: Zhè kē shù yízhí hòu shùnlì chénghuó le.
english: This tree survived successfully after being transplanted.

sentence: 出版社出版了这位作家的作品总集。
pinyin: Chūbǎnshè chūbǎn le zhè wèi zuòjiā de zuòpǐn zǒngjí.
english: The publisher released a complete anthology of this author's works.

sentence: 他在官场混了很多年。
pinyin: Tā zài guānchǎng hùn le hěn duō nián.
english: He has been in officialdom for many years.

sentence: 校长今天给优秀学生发奖。
pinyin: Xiàozhǎng jīntiān gěi yōuxiù xuéshēng fā jiǎng.
english: The principal is awarding prizes to outstanding students today.

sentence: 总统出行时总有卫队随行。
pinyin: Zǒngtǒng chūxíng shí zǒng yǒu wèiduì suíxíng.
english: The president always has a guard escort when traveling.

sentence: 你帮了他这么多，他理应感谢你。
pinyin: Nǐ bāng le tā zhème duō, tā lǐ yīng gǎnxiè nǐ.
english: You've helped him so much; he really ought to thank you.

sentence: 她喜欢给远方的朋友写信。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān gěi yuǎnfāng de péngyou xiě xìn.
english: She enjoys writing letters to friends far away.

sentence: 那段时间他夜夜难以入睡。
pinyin: Nà duàn shíjiān tā yèyè nán yǐ rùshuì.
english: During that period he had trouble sleeping every night.

sentence: 小孩跪下来捡地上的硬币。
pinyin: Xiǎohái guì xià lái jiǎn dì shàng de yìngbì.
english: The child knelt down to pick up the coin from the floor.

sentence: 他把钱包落在出租车上，真是个傻子。
pinyin: Tā bǎ qiánbāo là zài chūzū chē shàng, zhēn shì gè shǎzi.
english: He left his wallet in the taxi — what a fool.

sentence: 这道题需要用创造性的方式来解决。
pinyin: Zhè dào tí xūyào yòng chuàngzàoxìng de fāngshì lái jiějué.
english: This problem needs to be solved in a creative way.

meaning: 1. to continue to use (old methods); 2. to apply as before; 3. accordi
sentence: 这家店沿用了几十年前的老配方。
pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn yányòng le jǐ shí nián qián de lǎo pèifāng.
english: This shop continues to use a recipe from decades ago.

sentence: 那一年干旱导致了严重的饥荒。
pinyin: Nà yī nián gānhàn dǎozhì le yánzhòng de jīhuāng.
english: The drought that year caused a severe famine.

sentence: 香蕉放了几天就开始变黑了。
pinyin: Xiāngjiāo fàng le jǐ tiān jiù kāishǐ biàn hēi le.
english: The bananas started to darken after sitting out for a few days.

sentence: 他在大学学的是冶金专业。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xué de shì yějīn zhuānyè.
english: He studied metallurgy as his major in university.

meaning: 1. to accuse; 2. to denounce; 3. to make a complaint against; 4. denun
sentence: 她向法院控诉了那家公司的欺诈行为。
pinyin: Tā xiàng fǎyuàn kòngsù le nà jiā gōngsī de qīzhà xíngwéi.
english: She filed a complaint with the court accusing the company of fraud.

sentence: 这位评论家对这部电影给了很高的评价。
pinyin: Zhè wèi pínglùnjiā duì zhè bù diànyǐng gěi le hěn gāo de píngjià.
english: This critic gave the film a very high rating.

sentence: 公司明确规定禁止任何形式的种族歧视。
pinyin: Gōngsī míngquè guīdìng jìnzhǐ rènhé xíngshì de zhǒngzú qíshì.
english: The company clearly prohibits any form of racial discrimination.

meaning: 1. actual example; 2. living example; 3. illustration; 4. demonstratio
sentence: 老师用生活中的实例来解释这个概念。
pinyin: Lǎoshī yòng shēnghuó zhōng de shílì lái jiěshì zhège gàiniàn.
english: The teacher used real-life examples to explain the concept.

sentence: 这个板块的版主管理得很认真。
pinyin: Zhège bǎnkuài de bǎnzhǔ guǎnlǐ de hěn rènzhēn.
english: The moderator of this forum section does a very conscientious job.

meaning: seated image (of a Buddha or saint)
sentence: 寺庙里有一尊巨大的佛陀坐像。
pinyin: Sìmiào lǐ yǒu yī zūn jùdà de Fótuó zuòxiàng.
english: There is a huge seated Buddha statue in the temple.

sentence: 极端国家主义往往会引发冲突。
pinyin: Jíduān guójiā zhǔyì wǎngwǎng huì yǐnfā chōngtū.
english: Extreme nationalism often leads to conflict.

meaning: limited term of imprisonment (i.e. anything less than life imprisonmen
sentence: 他被判处三年有期徒刑。
pinyin: Tā bèi pànchǔ sān nián yǒuqī túxíng.
english: He was sentenced to three years in prison.

meaning: to change an emperor's or ruler's reign title (old)
sentence: 新皇帝登基后宣布改元。
pinyin: Xīn huángdì dēngjī hòu xuānbù gǎi yuán.
english: After ascending the throne, the new emperor declared a change of reign title.

sentence: 他在一家上市公司担任财务总监。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā shàngshì gōngsī dānrèn cáiwù zǒngjiān.
english: He serves as CFO at a listed company.

sentence: 这家银行的风险管理做得很到位。
pinyin: Zhè jiā yínháng de fēngxiǎn guǎnlǐ zuò de hěn dàowèi.
english: This bank's risk management is very well executed.

sentence: 樱花的花期只有一两周。
pinyin: Yīnghuā de huāqī zhǐyǒu yī liǎng zhōu.
english: Cherry blossoms are only in bloom for a week or two.

sentence: 这条消息由一家国际通讯社发布。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo xiāoxi yóu yī jiā guójì tōngxùnshè fābù.
english: This news was released by an international news agency.

sentence: 古代有钱人常娶小老婆。
pinyin: Gǔdài yǒuqián rén cháng qǔ xiǎo lǎo pó.
english: In ancient times, wealthy men often took concubines.

sentence: 村里的员外把土地租给了农民。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ de yuánwài bǎ tǔdì zū gěi le nóngmín.
english: The village landlord rented the land out to the farmers.
